summary: USCIS retweet of the White House's '365 Days of President Donald J. Trump' video (identical media file). It is a vertical montage set to music with animated text callouts: fast cuts of Trump before a row of world flags ('STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS'), color-graded Marines on razor wire, Trump in the Rose Garden, a White House event ('No Men In Women's SPORTS'), and a fireworks shot ('MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN'). There is no speech; the audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Trump seated at a table in front of a row of world flags (German, Italian, Ukrainian, UK); blue animated text overlay 'STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS.' No talking (music bed).
Color-graded shot of US Marines in helmets and packs working a concertina-razor-wire obstacle in the dirt.
Trump in a long dark overcoat walking across a stage in the White House Rose Garden, flanked by American flags and tulips; slow-motion.
Interior White House hallway with chandelier and flags as a group walks toward camera down a red carpet; yellow animated text 'No Men In Women's SPORTS.'
Back-of-head shot of Trump and a woman watching fireworks/lights; centered serif text 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' to close.

notable_text: On-screen kinetic text: 'STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS', 'No Men In Women's SPORTS', 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN'. Tweet (RT @WhiteHouse): '365 DAYS OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP. A Golden Age just getting started.'
